SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am12
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Client.UI.CLI

Class CLI

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Client.UI.CLI.CLI
All Implemented Interfaces:
UserInterface
public class CLI extends Object implements UserInterface
This class elaborates the commands from a CLI and creates the corresponding message to send to the Client controller. It also saves the graphic objects to print.

  • Constructor Details

    • CLI

      public CLI(ClientController controller)
      Class constructor
      Parameters:
      controller - the Client controller Starts a thread that listens to input from the user and sends the corresponding message to the controller

  • Method Details

    • propertyChange

      public void propertyChange(PropertyChange p)
      Notify the CLI that a property in the ViewModel changed
      Specified by:
      propertyChange in interface UserInterface
      Parameters:
      p - an instance of PropertyChange that describes with property has changed

    • setNickname

      public void setNickname(String nickname)
      Allow user to enter commands once his nickname hab been set
      Specified by:
      setNickname in interface UserInterface
      Parameters:
      nickname - the user nickname

    • enableCommand

      public void enableCommand()
      Allow user to enter commands

    • disableCommand

      public void disableCommand()
      Disables the possibility for the user to enter commands when the match is stopped

    • addPlayer

      public void addPlayer(String nickname)
      Adds a new playing grid denominated in the playinggrids map by the nickname of the owner
      Parameters:
      nickname - the name of the new player

    • getPlayingGrids

      public HashMap<String,CLIDrawBufferGrid> getPlayingGrids()
      Returns:
      a map that contains all the playing areas

    • getDrawtable

      public CLIDrawBufferTable getDrawtable()
      Returns:
      the buffer that prints the drawtable with the drawable cards

    • getHand

      public CLIDrawBufferHand getHand()
      Returns:
      the buffer that prints the cards in the hand of this player

    • getObjectives

      public CLIObjectivesBuffer getObjectives()
      Returns:
      the buffer that prints the objective cards, both the public and the secret ones

    • getIntermediateClassification

      public CLIClassificationBuffer getIntermediateClassification()
      Returns:
      the buffer that prints the intermediate classification

    • printObjectiveCard

      public void printObjectiveCard(int index)
      It prints the objective card defined or chosen with the last action
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the requested objective card
